title: data-manifest input spec
description: Input for ``data-manifest`` — mint an identity record for the input data.

roots.description: Optional OPAQUE relpath roots (files or directories) whose bytes are hashed into the manifest. When absent, defaults to the experiment's existing input declaration (interview.json's audited_source.input_roots) — the ONE 'what are my inputs' declaration. With neither present the verb REFUSES (spec_invalid): core never guesses a data/ directory.
roots.title: Roots

output_path.description: Optional manifest destination relpath (or absolute). Defaults to .hpc/data_manifest.json — the copilot-consumed caller record that sits with interview.json / axes.yaml.
output_path.title: Output Path
